title: Add ScreenFlow transition map mode
description: Extended Prototype View so ScreenFlow can render a screen transition map: screen images/cards connected by arrowed transitions, with click-through into paper-prototype playback.
decision_notes: Prototype View now has Map and Play modes. Map is the default because the user expects a screen transition diagram, not only paper-prototype playback.
Map mode uses the existing ScreenFlow graph and scenario order; it does not introduce a new engine or separate model.
Screen cards show image or fallback content, transition edges are SVG arrows, and clicking a card opens that screen in Play mode.
verification: browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/: .archmap-prototype-flow=1, cards=8, arrows=8; card click switches to Play mode
